metadata.description: Dispatch tasks to cursor-agent from Claude Code. In-place by default; --isolated opts into a sandbox worktree. Background jobs, session boundary safety, structured policy refusals.

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Six slash commands (/cursor:setup, /cursor:dispatch, /cursor:status, /cursor:result, /cursor:cancel, /cursor:cleanup) that hand a task off to cursor-agent. Default is in-place (edits the caller's cwd); --isolated runs in a sandbox worktree with auto-commit. Background jobs with full job control, per-Claude-session filtering, and structured policy refusals (`REFUSED: <CODE>`) suitable for autonomous callers.
